_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: 80% of the iNPC-derived GFP+ neurons were glutamatergic (v-Glut 1+), while only 1% were GABAergic (GAD67+)
details: 80% of iNPC-derived GFP+ neurons were glutamatergic (v-Glut 1+), while only 1% were GABAergic (GAD67+)
